response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong demonstrated work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and Java. Recent role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching a required skill. Track record shows architectural breadth (web, mobile, embedded), TDD/CI/CD practices, and ownership of open-source platforms. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited evidence of PostgreSQL at scale, but the core competencies and adaptability strongly suggest a productive fit.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience aligned with a required skill
Deep full-stack background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/K8s
Demonstrated engineering rigor: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, open-source ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Vitest not mentioned; testing experience appears centered on other frameworks
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Kotlin; relational DB depth unclear
